addrmap cgu {
   reg {
      field {
         desc = "Divide value for clock 0, 0=no divide, 1=divide by 2, 2=divide by 4, 3=divide by 6, ...";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
         reset = 8'h0;
      } divide[7:0];
      field {
         desc = "Reserved";
         sw = r;
         hw = na;
         reset = 24'h0;
      } Reserved[31:8];
   } clock0Divide @0x0;
   reg {
      field {
         desc = "Divide value for clock 1, 0=no divide, 1=divide by 2, 2=divide by 4, 3=divide by 6, ...";

         hw = r;
         reset = 8'h0;

         reset = 24'h0;
      } Reserved[31:8];

      field {
         desc = "ID Field";
         sw = r;
         hw = w;
         reset = 32'hd00;
      } ID[31:0];
   } IDReg @0xffc;

                                  (primary_literal
                                    (number))))))))))))
              (component_insts
                (component_inst
                  (id
                    (id_start))
                  (constant_expression
                    (constant_primary
                      (primary_literal
                        (number))))))))
          (component_body_elem
            (component_def
              (component_anon_def
                (component_type
                  (component_primary_type))
                (component_body
                  (component_body_elem
                    (component_def
                      (component_anon_def
                        (component_type
                          (component_primary_type))
                        (component_body
                          (component_body_elem
                            (explicit_component_inst
                              (id
                                (id_start))
                              (component_insts
                                (component_inst
                                  (constant_expression
                                    (constant_primary
                                      (primary_literal
                                        (string_literal))))))))
                          (component_body_elem
                            (property_assignment
                              (explicit_or_default_prop_assignment
                                (explicit_prop_assignment
                                  (prop_assignment_lhs
                                    (prop_keyword))
                                  (prop_assignment_rhs
                                    (constant_expression
                                      (constant_primary
                                        (primary_literal
                                          (accesstype_literal)))))))))

                            (property_assignment
                              (explicit_or_default_prop_assignment

                                    (prop_keyword))
